description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture and culinary delights of Taipei, where every corner tells a story and every meal is a celebration. This 4-day journey is perfect for families looking to explore the rich history and unique flavors of Taiwan, while also indulging in the world of Ghibli. From bustling night markets to serene temples, prepare for an unforgettable adventure filled with discovery and joy.

activities.description: Arrive at your hotel in Taipei and settle in. Take a moment to relax and refresh before heading out to explore the city.
Savor the world-famous xiaolongbao (soup dumplings) at Din Tai Fung, a must-visit for any foodie in Taipei. The restaurant's meticulous preparation and delicious flavors will surely impress.

Explore Taipei 101, once the tallest building in the world. Take the high-speed elevator to the observation deck for breathtaking views of the city and beyond. Don't forget to check out the shopping mall at the base for some unique souvenirs.
Visit the Ghibli Store in Taipei to find exclusive merchandise and fan goods from your favorite Studio Ghibli films. It's a perfect spot to pick up unique souvenirs for yourself or loved ones.

Head to Shilin Night Market, one of the largest and most famous night markets in Taipei. Enjoy a variety of local street foods, from stinky tofu to bubble tea, and immerse yourself in the vibrant atmosphere.
Continue exploring Shilin Night Market for more shopping opportunities. Look for unique Ghibli-themed items and other local crafts as you stroll through the bustling stalls.

activities.activity: Breakfast at a Local Taiwanese Breakfast Spot
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty Taiwanese breakfast. Try the classic soy milk and fried dough sticks (you tiao) for an authentic taste of Taipei.
Explore contemporary art at the Taipei Fine Arts Museum. The museum features a variety of exhibitions that showcase both local and international artists, making it a perfect spot for art lovers.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at a nearby restaurant, where you can savor traditional Taiwanese dishes like beef noodle soup or braised pork rice.
Head to the Ghibli Museum Store in Taipei to find exclusive merchandise and fan goods from your favorite Studio Ghibli films. It's a must-visit for any Ghibli fan!
Take a leisurely stroll in the nearby park, enjoying the serene atmosphere and perhaps spotting some local wildlife. It's a great way to relax after your museum visit.
Experience the vibrant atmosphere of a night market for dinner. Sample a variety of street foods, from stinky tofu to bubble tea, and enjoy the lively ambiance.
After a fulfilling day of exploration, return to your hotel to relax and prepare for another exciting day ahead in Taipei.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Yonghe Soy Milk King
activities.description: Start your day with a traditional Taiwanese breakfast at Yonghe Soy Milk King, famous for its warm soy milk and crispy fried dough sticks. It's a local favorite and a perfect way to fuel up for a day of exploration.

Visit the iconic Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall, a symbol of Taiwan's history. The grand architecture and beautiful gardens provide a serene atmosphere, and you can witness the changing of the guard ceremony at the main hall.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at Din Tai Fung, renowned for its xiaolongbao (soup dumplings). The restaurant's meticulous preparation and flavorful dishes make it a must-visit for food lovers.
Explore Longshan Temple, one of the oldest and most famous temples in Taipei. The intricate carvings and vibrant atmosphere offer a glimpse into Taiwan's spiritual heritage.

Head to Ximending, a lively shopping district known for its trendy shops and street food. This area is perfect for finding Ghibli merchandise and other unique souvenirs. Don't forget to try some local snacks while you explore!

activities.activity: Dinner at Ay Chung Rice Noodle
activities.description: Savor a bowl of the famous Taiwanese rice noodles at Ay Chung Rice Noodle. This casual eatery is beloved for its flavorful broth and generous portions, making it a great way to end your day.

activities.activity: Evening stroll at Daan Forest Park
activities.description: Take a leisurely evening stroll at Daan Forest Park, a peaceful oasis in the city. Enjoy the lush greenery and tranquil atmosphere as you unwind after a busy day of sightseeing.
Start your day with a delicious breakfast at a cozy café in Taipei. Enjoy local favorites like Taiwanese pancakes or a hearty sandwich paired with freshly brewed coffee.

Head to the Ghibli Store in Taipei to explore a magical world of Studio Ghibli merchandise. From plush toys to art books, this is a must-visit for any Ghibli fan looking to take home a piece of their favorite films.

Savor a delicious lunch at the famous Din Tai Fung, known for its mouthwatering xiaolongbao (soup dumplings). The restaurant's reputation for quality and flavor makes it a perfect spot to enjoy Taiwanese cuisine.

After lunch, visit Huashan 1914 Creative Park, a vibrant cultural hub filled with art exhibitions, shops, and cafés. It's a great place to soak in the local art scene and perhaps find unique souvenirs.
Spend some time shopping for souvenirs at nearby shops. Look for unique Ghibli-themed items or other local crafts to remember your trip by.

activities.activity: Dinner at a Local Night Market
activities.description: End your day with dinner at a local night market. Sample a variety of street foods, from stinky tofu to bubble tea, and enjoy the lively atmosphere of Taipei's night scene.
